AN ENFORCEMENT OSC RE: COMPLIANCE WITH ARBITRATION IS ORDERED SET ON 12/18/2003 AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT TO SCHEDULE A PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEPTEMBER. MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and defendant. Order to Show Cause to Rocky V. Ortega for failure to appear at the 7/14/2003 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction extended to 11/18/2003. An enforcement OSC re: compliance with Arbitration is ordered set on 12/18/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Court to schedule a Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on September. Court to give notice. The OSC to plaintiff's counsel on today's calendar is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long, CSR#8620. (212)
